programme.title: Rose West & Myra Hindley: Their Untold Story with Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: The veteran journalist tells the extraordinary untold story of how the two most notorious women in British crime, Rose West and Myra Hindley, became lesbian lovers in jail. programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Veteran singer and keyboard player Alan Price guest stars in this festive episode of the rural drama, as the leader of a jazz band. Travelling to Aidensfield, where they've been booked by Vernon to play at the villagers' Christmas concert, the Rio Trio offer a lift to a girl, unaware she is a single mum taking her baby home to see her parents for the holiday. However, the first the band know about the infant is when the girl disappears, leaving them to look after it. Meanwhile, as the concert gets into full swing, local barmaid Gina takes centre stage, hoping to impress all and sundry with her rendition of Winter Wonderland. Tricia Penrose, Derek Fowlds, Geoffrey Hughes, William Simons and Mark Jordon star

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Walker is forced to confront his past when he undertakes his own unofficial investigation into a series of violent robberies around Aidensfield. Helen has to come to terms with the fact that her marriage is probably over when Matthew's mistress appears in the village, and David finds himself involved in some shady behaviour. Jonathan Kerrigan, Sophie Ward, Oliver Montgomery and David Lonsdale star

programme.desc: Sophie is scared when Butch locks her in Zoe's house. Biff is desperately trying to get in shape for his fight. Alan bars Charlie from the pub until she can prove she is 18

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Biff is still determined to go ahead with the fight. Steve apologises to Kim for missing their lunch date. Kim questions Sophie about her relationship with Zoe

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Claire is upset that Des will not commit to her. Don spoils Ashley's plans to go out with Kelly. Ken goes to Southport with Sue, and Deirdre warns him to be on his guard

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Spurred into action by the discovery of a woman's body in Midsomer Worthy's Raven's Wood, Barnaby and Troy re-examine three similar unsolved murders in the same village nine years previously, hoping to get a lead before the killer strikes again. As they dig deeper into the clandestine world of the community, they find themselves embroiled in a sinister web of deceit, violence and mystery. Guest starring Phyllis Logan, and featuring Toby Jones' first appearance in a recurring role as pathologist Dan Peterson

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Gruff detective Jack Frost's plans for a quiet weekend are disrupted by the gruesome discovery of an unidentified body floating in the river. However, soon after he has begun the investigation, he is forced to apply his deductive skills to a separate case involving an act of violence during a football match which left a player in a coma. Crime drama, starring David Jason, Larry Lamb, Bruce Alexander, Lindy Whiteford and Berwick Kaler

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A masterpiece by landscape artist Henry Hogson causes a stir when it is auctioned for £400,000 after a fierce bidding war - and hours later, its former owner is tortured and killed. When a Hogson work is then stolen, Barnaby and Jones research the Midsomer painter with the help of art teacher Matilda Simms. They soon uncover evidence of forgery - but the killer is still at large. Guest starring David Bamber and Susannah Harker, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. With Pamela Jefferies in a coma following her vicious attack, Banks becomes more determined to find Rothwell's killer. Convinced a vital clue is staring him in the face, he resolves to learn more about Keith Rothwell and, against orders, questions MP Martin Fleming, putting him on a collision course with rival DCI Burgess. Meanwhile, the return of Tom Rothwell to the UK presents Helen with another suspect and an opportunity to put pressure on his family. With Patrick Baladi

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is asked to investigate the disappearance of a bank's most valued customer, who had been planning to sell the chairman a map showing where to find a long-lost silver mine. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A dentist falls in love with his young assistant. His anxious wife, believing he has made plans to poison her and thereby remove the main obstacle to happiness, calls for Poirot's help. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Gruff detective Jack Frost's plans for a quiet weekend are disrupted by the gruesome discovery of an unidentified body floating in the river. However, soon after he has begun the investigation, he is forced to apply his deductive skills to a separate case involving an act of violence during a football match which left a player in a coma. Crime drama, starring David Jason, Larry Lamb, Bruce Alexander, Lindy Whiteford and Berwick Kaler

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Bellamy and Walker hunt for a batch of stolen Russian icons, and suspect the victim of an assault at the Aidensfield Arms might be involved when they discover his criminal connections. Vernon embarks on another hare-brained scheme when he meets an Italian truffle salesman, while Helen is puzzled by a youngster's baffling medical history. Guest starring David Dickinson as antiques dealer Crispin Jones, with Mark Jordon, Jonathan Kerrigan and Geoffrey Hughes

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Biff visits Linda after her miscarriage. Sarah is furious with Rachel when she lets Andy go off with his dad. Zak wants to open his own museum at the Dingles

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chris makes a nasty remark to Biff about Linda's miscarriage. Mandy bans Butch from Charlie's party as Sophie will be there. Biff pours his heart out to Kathy

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Des and Claire assure Becky they are not splitting up. Curly and Raquel get a shock when they spend an evening with the Malletts. Sue opens her heart to Ken

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Des accuses Claire of looking for a reason to finish with him. Ken is horrified to find Sue unconscious in his hotel room. Don advises Ashley to be masterful with Kelly

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Travellers descend on the sleepy village of Martyr Warren, antagonising local magistrate Hector Bridges, whose subsequent death by shooting brings matters to a head in dramatic fashion. Barnaby and Troy's investigation uncovers the victim has a history with one of the travellers - but revelations that he terrorised his family suggest that the killer may be closer to home

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: An armed robbery ends in murder and Frost wastes no time in arresting a known crook he saw at the scene during the getaway, convinced he is one of the men responsible. With this little mystery to solve, as well as a case of four burglaries in as many days at the same house, the dogged policeman's lot proves a busy one indeed. David Jason stars, with Billy Murray and James Hayes

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A magician's assistant drops dead on stage, poisoned by the toxins from a tropical frog. While Barnaby and Jones begin their investigations, tempers flare in the local community between Ernest, a firm believer in a mystical cult, and his former friend Aloysius - whose background in the jungles of South America makes him the prime suspect for the murder. Starring John Nettles, Ronald Pickup and Stuart Wilson

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part one of two. Frustrated that a number of cases have been knocked back by the Crown Prosecution Service, Banks and the team are called on to investigate the murder of teenager Ellie Clayton, daughter of a high-profile internet entrepreneur. The victim's background, together with the suggestion she may have been raped, means the incident is soon the subject of much media speculation, and strong evidence implicates a theatre director who ran a drama workshop the girl attended on the night she died. The detective believes he has found his man, but Morton fears her colleague isn't seeing the bigger picture

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Julia McKenzie returns as the sleuthing spinster in the first of three murder mysteries. While staying at a hotel in the Caribbean, Miss Marple investigates the death of a fellow guest, refusing to believe he died of a heart attack. With the help of a business tycoon she sets about finding the real cause of the man's demise, and is soon drawn into a web of deceit and dark magic. Adapted by Charlie Higson and co-starring Antony Sher, Robert Webb, Montserrat Lombard, Daniel Rigby, Hermione Norris, MyAnna Buring, Warren Brown and Oliver Ford Davies

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: An armed robbery ends in murder and Frost wastes no time in arresting a known crook he saw at the scene during the getaway, convinced he is one of the men responsible. With this little mystery to solve, as well as a case of four burglaries in as many days at the same house, the dogged policeman's lot proves a busy one indeed. David Jason stars, with Billy Murray and James Hayes

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: After resigning from his job as a traffic warden, henpecked George wonders how he can break the news to wife Mildred without incurring her wrath. Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce star

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: An armed robbery ends in murder and Frost wastes no time in arresting a known crook he saw at the scene during the getaway, convinced he is one of the men responsible. With this little mystery to solve, as well as a case of four burglaries in as many days at the same house, the dogged policeman's lot proves a busy one indeed. David Jason stars, with Billy Murray and James Hayes

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: New broom Sgt Miller (John Duttine) introduces a rapid response car but his big city ideas receive a cool reception from the Aidensfield watch. Walker is beaten up by hoodlums but falls for nurse Clare Owen during his stay in hospital

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Charlie demands to know what happened between Greg and Emma. Biff cannot face going home. The Dingles' medieval museum is nearly ready for opening

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Tony receives a mystery phone call. Sarah worries about Andy's behaviour since his dad returned. Kim catches Steve and Charlie in a romantic clinch

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kelly is upset that Ashley is trying to act macho. Sue apologises to Ken for all that happened in Southport. Claire and Becky move into the bookie's flat

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maud reads Raquel's palm and tells her she is going to be travelling soon. The pensioner also urges Maureen to get passionate with Bill. Audrey and Alma go to a health farm

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Troy set out to find a motive for a terminally ill property developer's murder. Many of the Badger's Drift residents have reason to hold a grudge against their charmless neighbour, including a theatre director with unhappy childhood memories, whom Cully gets the chance to work with. Mystery, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey, Richard Briers and Judy Parfitt

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack's house burns down, forcing him to move in with a colleague. At work, he becomes involved in the search for a kidnapper after a young woman disappears. Long-running crime drama, starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, John Lyons and Marc Warren

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The murder of a babysitter throws up a number of questions for Lewis and Hathaway - was she the intended victim or was the killer targeting her employers? Was the crime calculated or opportunistic? And why was she elaborately tied up after being murdered? As the detectives dig for clues, they are led into a world of suburban swinging and fetish photography, far removed from the Oxford they know. Gary Kemp (The Krays), Lucy Cohu (The Awakening), Ciaran McMenamin (Primeval) and Georgia Taylor (Casualty) guest star

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. The collapse of Owen Pierce's trial has left the case wide open and there's still a killer on the loose, but Banks remains determined to build a watertight legal case against his prime suspect. As the investigation continues, Morton and Jackman uncover promising new leads focusing on Ellie's ex-boyfriend Tyler, but just as they seem to be getting close to the truth, another schoolgirl is murdered, putting Pierce in the spotlight once again

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A wealthy banker goes missing while walking from his country house to the village post office. Poirot, who has acquired a parrot and developed a taste for conjuring tricks, bets the baffled Inspector Japp £5 he can solve the mystery without leaving his own apartment. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth contemplates retiring while on a trip to the Lake District, but shelves his plans when Hastings meets a woman whose collection of valuable miniature portraits has been stolen. David Suchet stars

programme.desc: Jack's house burns down, forcing him to move in with a colleague. At work, he becomes involved in the search for a kidnapper after a young woman disappears. Long-running crime drama, starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, John Lyons and Marc Warren

programme.desc: Raquel tells Curly if he wants children he needs to show commitment. Ken tries to get out of going to the conference with Sue. Roy catches Jamie skiving off school

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve spends another night with Kim. Kelly starts a fight with Lyn Hutchinson. Zoe phones the police when Sophie realises her overnight bag has been stolen

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Biff embarks on a fitness regime. Zak makes Butch swear that he was not at Zoe's the previous night. Billy turns up unannounced at the Sugdens' home to see Andy

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Veteran singer and keyboard player Alan Price guest stars in this festive episode of the rural drama, as the leader of a jazz band. Travelling to Aidensfield, where they've been booked by Vernon to play at the villagers' Christmas concert, the Rio Trio offer a lift to a girl, unaware she is a single mum taking her baby home to see her parents for the holiday. However, the first the band know about the infant is when the girl disappears, leaving them to look after it. Meanwhile, as the concert gets into full swing, local barmaid Gina takes centre stage, hoping to impress all and sundry with her rendition of Winter Wonderland. Tricia Penrose, Derek Fowlds, Geoffrey Hughes, William Simons and Mark Jordon star

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Jean worries about strange noises coming from next door. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James as the head of the family, struggling to keep his wife and children in tow

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid is very surprised to find a well under his house. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James as the head of the family, struggling to keep his wife and children in order

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Mildred faces the prospect of becoming a step-grandmother when George's past catches up with him. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack tackles what promises to be the most sensitive and unenviable investigation of his entire career - deciding whether a man with Down's syndrome is capable of committing murder. David Jason stars as the caustic copper, with Bruce Alexander and Matthew Marsh

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Walker is forced to confront his past when he undertakes his own unofficial investigation into a series of violent robberies around Aidensfield. Helen has to come to terms with the fact that her marriage is probably over when Matthew's mistress appears in the village, and David finds himself involved in some shady behaviour. Jonathan Kerrigan, Sophie Ward, Oliver Montgomery and David Lonsdale star

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Claire is upset that Des will not commit to her. Don spoils Ashley's plans to go out with Kelly. Ken goes to Southport with Sue, and Deirdre warns him to be on his guard

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Spurred into action by the discovery of a woman's body in Midsomer Worthy's Raven's Wood, Barnaby and Troy re-examine three similar unsolved murders in the same village nine years previously, hoping to get a lead before the killer strikes again. As they dig deeper into the clandestine world of the community, they find themselves embroiled in a sinister web of deceit, violence and mystery. Guest starring Phyllis Logan, and featuring Toby Jones' first appearance in a recurring role as pathologist Dan Peterson

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Gruff detective Jack Frost's plans for a quiet weekend are disrupted by the gruesome discovery of an unidentified body floating in the river. Crime drama, starring David Jason, Larry Lamb, Bruce Alexander, Lindy Whiteford and Berwick Kaler

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A masterpiece by landscape artist Henry Hogson causes a stir when it is auctioned for £400,000 after a fierce bidding war - and hours later, its former owner is tortured and killed. When a Hogson work is then stolen, Barnaby and Jones research the Midsomer painter with the help of art teacher Matilda Simms. They soon uncover evidence of forgery - but the killer is still at large. Guest starring David Bamber and Susannah Harker, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes

Many of the Badger's Drift residents have reason to hold a grudge against their charmless neighbour, including a theatre director with unhappy childhood memories, whom Cully gets the chance to work with. Mystery, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey, Richard Briers and Judy Parfitt

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack's house burns down, forcing him to move in with a colleague. At work, he becomes involved in the search for a kidnapper after a young woman disappears. Long-running crime drama, starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, John Lyons and Marc Warren

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The murder of a babysitter throws up a number of questions for Lewis and Hathaway - was she the intended victim or was the killer targeting her employers? Was the crime calculated or opportunistic? And why was she elaborately tied up after being murdered? As the detectives dig for clues, they are led into a world of suburban swinging and fetish photography, far removed from the Oxford they know. Gary Kemp (The Krays), Lucy Cohu (The Awakening), Ciaran McMenamin (Primeval) and Georgia Taylor (Casualty) guest star

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. The collapse of Owen Pierce's trial has left the case wide open and there's still a killer on the loose, but Banks remains determined to build a watertight legal case against his prime suspect. As the investigation continues, Morton and Jackman uncover promising new leads focusing on Ellie's ex-boyfriend Tyler, but just as they seem to be getting close to the truth, another schoolgirl is murdered, putting Pierce in the spotlight once again

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A wealthy banker goes missing while walking from his country house to the village post office. Poirot, who has acquired a parrot and developed a taste for conjuring tricks, bets the baffled Inspector Japp £5 he can solve the mystery without leaving his own apartment. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth contemplates retiring while on a trip to the Lake District, but shelves his plans when Hastings meets a woman whose collection of valuable miniature portraits has been stolen. David Suchet stars

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack's house burns down, forcing him to move in with a colleague. At work, he becomes involved in the search for a kidnapper after a young woman disappears. Long-running crime drama, starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, John Lyons and Marc Warren

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid is left two large packing cases in an uncle's will - but they come with a terrible curse

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The son of an ex-informant is kidnapped and the Flying Squad is brought in to assist in the hunt. Against Regan's advice his father, a wealthy businessman, pays the ransom and the boy is returned. However, the reunion quickly turns sour. Joss Ackland guest stars, with John Thaw

programme.title: The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A man dies suddenly of a mysterious fever and Holmes suspects murder, but a malign influence takes its toll on the detective as he delves into the underworld of London's docklands. Starring Jeremy Brett, with Roy Hudd

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Mrs Peel track down a mysterious glowing man responsible for a string of macabre and grisly murders. Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg star, with a guest appearance by Ray McAnally

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur's plans to rig the Winchester's quiz night go awry when the questionmaster, an escaped convict, surrenders himself to the police officers present after suffering a turn. Comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: The resources of CI5 are stretched when a mentally unbalanced former soldier starts killing hospital staff, believing them responsible for the death of his wife and for the brain damage suffered by his young daughter. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The Flying Squad trails diamond thief Jimmy Fleet on the inside, with Carter acting undercover as a fellow prisoner aiming to gain his confidence. On his release for lack of evidence, Fleet seeks Carter's assistance after discovering his girlfriend has vanished with the jewels, suspecting she has been abducted. Michael Elphick guest stars

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar sets out on the trail of a former Nazi believed to have taken refuge in South America. Vintage drama, guest starring Francesca Annis, Roger Delgado, John Barrie and Maurice Kaufmann

programme.title: The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Mycroft Holmes joins his brother to investigate the murder of a professor's secretary. The only clue is a golden pince-nez found clenched in the hand of the victim. Charles Gray guest stars

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: A friend of Emma's returns from abroad in the hope of retiring to Little Storping-in-the-Swurf, but discovers the village is harbouring a secret. Starring Diana Rigg and Patrick Macnee

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur buys a hot-air balloon and attempts to break into aerial advertising. However, he is later abducted by a psychotic business rival who takes him to a disused power station, leaving Ray with the puzzle of how to track him down. George Cole and Gary Webster star

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are asked to keep a surveillance on Cowley after evidence suggests he has stolen two canisters of a lethal nerve gas and begun negotiating with an unfriendly foreign power. The plot thickens when they trace their boss to a country mansion, where after they are caught he denies knowing them

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Guest stars Eric Morecambe and Ernie Wise are entrusted to guard a consignment of heart pills by the girlfriend of the eminent research chemist developing the medicine. Before long, the comedy duo find themselves pursued by Middle Eastern operatives intent on procuring the new drug, as well as Sweeney officers who are trying to protect them. With John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which a team of five family members answers questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then tries to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money. Subjects in this episode include the Winter Olympics, Tudor monarchs and the US

programme.title: World Superbike Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the sixth round of the season at the Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya in Montmeló. Great Britain's Jonathan Rea and Scott Redding, of Kawasaki and Ducati respectively, were the top two in the standings going into this round

programme.title: World Rally Championship Highlights
programme.desc: The Rally Turkey. Action from the fifth round of the campaign, as the drivers navigated rocky gravel roads in the mountains of the south west of the country

programme.title: Planet of the Apes (2001)
programme.desc: An astronaut crash-lands on a strange planet and is captured and enslaved by the ruling race of highly intelligent apes. Luckily, he is helped by a sympathetic chimpanzee - but then discovers a shocking secret. Remake of the 1960s sci-fi adventure, directed by Tim Burton and starring Mark Wahlberg, Helena Bonham Carter and Tim Roth, and featuring a cameo appearance from the original film's star Charlton Heston

Sci-fi thriller sequel, with Adrien Brody, Topher Grace, Alice Braga, Danny Trejo and Laurence Fishburne

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: An apparently respected gynaecologist's suitcase is stolen, but he is reluctant to reveal its contents. programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar saves the life of the prime minister of a British colony. Guest starring Edward Woodward

programme.title: The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A reclusive lodger's strange behaviour sends his landlady running to Holmes for advice - and what initially seems to be a simple matter turns into a mystery involving an Italian secret society and murder in New York. Drama, starring Jeremy Brett

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed is called in to investigate when Sir Gerald Bancroft and his Rolls-Royce mysteriously disappear while being escorted around a military base. Light-hearted drama, starring Patrick Macnee, Diana Rigg and Francis Matthews

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur becomes a rebel without a clue by launching a motorbike despatch agency - but Ray is concerned the entire venture is heading for a crash. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are pitted against KGB assassins when a CI5 operative is apparently raised from the dead. A proposed exchange finds Cowley at a deserted aerodrome, and a burst of gunfire apparently leaves his life on the line. Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson star

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A sergeant is injured in a shooting incident and names his informant as the person responsible. However, the suspected man's girlfriend insists that the officer is corrupt and steals away to be with her lover, who has gone into hiding. Lynda La Plante guest stars

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: In Fiji's South Pacific paradise, people are coming under attack. Plunging off the beaten track into the remote mountains of the island's interior, freshwater detective Jeremy battles tropical storms and unforgiving jungles in an all-out search for victims, clues, and culprits. Colourful stories of monstrous fish are woven into the local folklore, but how much of this is fanciful, and how much of it is real?

programme.title: British Superbike Championship Highlights
programme.desc: James Haydon presents highlights of all three races in the fourth round of the campaign from Snetterton. Glenn Irwin of Honda Racing was top of the standings after the opening three races and was looking to extend his lead

programme.title: King of the Roads
programme.desc: Action from the rescheduled Cookstown 100, as newcomers and fan vfavourites alike battled it out on the Orritor Circuit in Co Tyrone

programme.title: Scarface (1983)
programme.desc: Small-time crook Tony Montana emigrates from Cuba to the US, determined to become rich and powerful. Admitted into the inner circle of a Miami drug lord, he ultimately takes over his boss's empire and even his wife. However, his paranoia and cocaine addiction begin to spiral out of control, while his enemies circle, waiting for the chance to bring him down. Gangster thriller remake, with Al Pacino, Michelle Pfeiffer and Robert Loggia

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin and Francesca Cumani present coverage of day one of the Cambridgeshire meeting, including the 3.00 Tattersalls Stakes and the 3.35 Rose Bowl. With analysis from Jason Weaver and Kevin Blake, reports by Natalie Green, and commentary from Richard Hoiles

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Featuring George Best, Zaire's 1974 World Cup campaign and a selection of own goals

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: A mentally unbalanced criminal sets out in search of vengeance for the death of his brother and frames Harry for murder. Drama, starring Robert Vaughn, Nyree Dawn Porter and Tony Anholt

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A captured British spy is released when his Russian counterpart falls into British hands. C15 is tasked with ensuring his safety as well as establishing whether his information is genuine. However, such intentions fail miserably when he is poisoned. Bodie and Doyle set out to determine what part his daughter, a concert pianist, played in his death - assuming she really is his daughter

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A security guard is murdered during a payroll snatch, and Regan and Carter are called in to support local investigating officers. However, bad blood between the maverick detective inspector and the force's chief superintendent going back several years manifests itself in an old allegation of corruption being rekindled. Richard Griffiths features alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman in the final episode of the crime drama

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Warwick Davis hosts the quiz, in which a team of five friends who go fishing together answers questions about top 10 lists then tries to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: King of the Roads
programme.desc: More action from the rescheduled Cookstown 100, as the only national road race to be held in Northern Ireland this year continued on the Orritor Circuit in Co Tyrone

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.desc: Biopic of the infamous twin brothers who built up a criminal empire in the East End of London during the 1960s. Plunging off the beaten track into the remote mountains of the island's interior, freshwater detective Jeremy battles tropical storms and unforgiving jungles in an all-out search for victims, clues, and culprits. Colourful stories of monstrous fish are woven into the local folklore, but how much of this is fanciful, and how much of it is real?

programme.title: British Superbike Championship Highlights
programme.desc: James Haydon presents highlights of all three races in the fourth round of the campaign from Snetterton. Glenn Irwin of Honda Racing was top of the standings after the opening three races and was looking to extend his lead

programme.title: Scarface (1983)
programme.desc: Small-time crook Tony Montana emigrates from Cuba to the US, determined to become rich and powerful. Admitted into the inner circle of a Miami drug lord, he ultimately takes over his boss's empire and even his wife. However, his paranoia and cocaine addiction begin to spiral out of control, while his enemies circle, waiting for the chance to bring him down. Gangster thriller remake, with Al Pacino, Michelle Pfeiffer and Robert Loggia

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A captured British spy is released when his Russian counterpart falls into British hands. Bodie and Doyle set out to determine what part his daughter, a concert pianist, played in his death - assuming she really is his daughter

programme.title: The Sweeney

programme.desc: Part one of two. Sandi Toksvig helps eight adults who cannot read or write to master basic literacy, setting them fun challenges to put what they have learned so far to the test. In the first episode, Sandi meets the group for the first time, and after four weeks of tuition, they are set a travel-based challenge in the Peak District, getting to grips with map reading , signs, and railway departure boards. Prue Leith joins Sandi to set a cookery challenge - they must prepare a chicken pie from her recipe, including acquiring all the ingredients

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's armchair critics share more of their critiques of the week's biggest and best shows. They've been watching Who Wants To Be A Millionaire?, (Un)well, Extinction: The Facts, Des, The Third Day, BBC News on the R number, and Breakfast with Michael Gove on Brexit

programme.title: Shameless
programme.desc: Frank plots with Norma and her lesbian friends to stage his own death. After hosting his own drunken wake and lying in state in the Gallaghers' front room, he sees the folly of his ways when he realises he cannot claim his beloved dole. Starring David Threlfall, Jody Latham and Dystin Johnson

programme.title: Five Guys a Week
programme.desc: Essex-based photographer Chris, haulage guy Lou, shopping centre manager Adam, health worker Kris and oven cleaning technician Michael move in with Tara, a 32-year-old business consultant from Halifax in West Yorkshire, each hoping to win her affections. Nearly all of Tara's friends are married, and just about the most serious relationship she had to date has been with Kaiser - her beloved German shepherd. Top of Tara's list of requirements is a man who can make her laugh. Eventually, five become one - will Tara make the right choice?

programme.title: The Lift Boy (2017)
programme.desc: The son of a elevator operator dreams of being an engineer, but constantly fails to make any progress. When his father falls ill, he begrudgingly takes on his menial job to support his family - and unexpectedly finds a new outlook on life. Comedy drama, starring Moin Khan and Nyla Masood. In Hindi and Maranthi, with English subtitles

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Debbie at Riverside Wildlife Rehabilitation Centre calls on fellow Brit Emma to take in two baby jackals that have been found abandoned, while Emily and Will relocate two cheetahs

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of favourite investigations from the team. Jimmy Doherty hears about a threat to British juniper berries that could mark the end of gin's recent resurgence in popularity, while Kate Quilton delves into the contents of herbal bedtime teas to establish if they really can help people get to sleep more easily. Big oyster fan Matt Tebbutt wonders why he never finds pearls in his seafood platters so sets off for China, where he discovers that pearl production is full of surprises

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Victoria brings home a new boyfriend called James, and the entire family wonders whether she might have found 'the one' at last. Comedy, guest-starring Mather Zickel

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam lies to Diane about his plans for a weekend away, and Coach tries to break his record for fewest glasses smashed in a month, while Norm starts spending all his time with a new friend, leaving Cliff feeling neglected. American bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Coach is upset about the death of an old baseball buddy and holds a memorial to him in the bar, but then discovers the man once propositioned his wife. Nicholas Colasanto stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie decides 40 years of marriage to Frank is enough for any woman and moves in with Ray - to the delight of Robert, who enjoys being mothered by her. Debra is unhappy with the situation and tries to persuade her father-in-law to apologise, but he is enjoying the single life too much to agree

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra's snooty parents announce they are going to pay a visit - much to the dismay of Ray, who pleads with Frank and Marie to be on their best behaviour and avoid embarrassing him. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray ignores Frank's advice and loses all his cash in a poker game. Debra urges him to ask for the money back, but he is too proud to beg his father for help. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.desc: Niles leaves nothing to chance as he plans the perfect evening to propose to Daphne, but his efforts to persuade Martin to get her meddling mother out of the way by taking her on an impromptu date lead to disaster. Comedy, guest starring Millicent Martin, with John Mahoney and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Lilith's supposedly disabled half-brother Blaine Sternin comes to town seeking forgiveness for past misdemeanours - but Frasier is suspicious of his motives. Comedy, guest starring Michael Keaton (Batman)

programme.desc: Greg Miller, CEO of the Larry H Miller Group of Companies and co-owner of National Basketball Association team the Utah Jazz, goes undercover. Since his father died he has made many changes to the organisation, and posing as a contestant on a reality TV competition to win a dream job, he works among his own staff to see if his dad's legacy still lives on

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: A special programme celebrating the show's 20th anniversary, as Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back over two decades of house-hunting together. In this episode, the pair reminisce about some of their previous house-hunting missions where lifestyle needed to be balanced with business. Champion dog trainer Lauren needed land for her collies, while parents Carole and Alan wanted adjoining buildings to set up a holiday rental business.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 14-year-old is rushed to St George's after falling head first over the handlebars of her bike and hitting her head, and doctors are concerned she may have caused serious damage. Meanwhile, Geoffrey, who is 56, has been urgently transferred from another hospital after a severe infection left him with a compromised airway and struggling to breathe

programme.title: Grayson Perry's Big American Road Trip
programme.desc: Artist and social commentator Grayson Perry travels across the pre-pandemic US, spending time with people from all walks of life to explore the divisions across the nation - issues that have since been thrown into sharper focus. He begins in the American South, where he tackles race - arguably the oldest and most intractable division in the US. Travelling from Atlanta, Georgia, to Washington, DC, he explores older ideas of African American success with members of the so-called 'black elite' and reflects on the issue of white privilege

programme.title: Trump: An American Dream
programme.desc: Documentary charting Donald Trump's extraordinary journey through five decades as businessman, developer, media star and politician before reaching the White House. The series also considers how the president's rise reflects the story of modern America - one of capitalism, celebrity, reality TV and social media

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Italian family restaurant Sabatiello's in Stamford, Connecticut, where the owner's fiery temper upsets the staff and has left him more than $1million in debt. Gordon's help is urgently needed to get customers back through the door, but the restaurateur does not take kindly to criticism and closes the restaurant down when his employees turn on him

programme.title: Inside the Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Sergeant David 'Podders' Podmore is called out to investigate after a shooting in the Liverpool area, and following a raid at a property, a number of weapons are seized, including a potential improvised explosive device made out of industrial fireworks. Meanwhile, Sam Jones and Matt Coogan head to the scene of a mortar bomb discovery, while Sergeant Alex 'Swansea' Hughes is called to Llandudno, where a magnet fisherman has taken a mortar that he's found to work

programme.title: Lodgers for Codgers
programme.desc: With the majority of people under 30 struggling to get on the property ladder, and millions of over-sixties sitting on empty rooms, young and old are tackling Britain's housing crisis by trialling a unique solution - moving in together. This time, Cairo, who was homeless for several years, leaves his temporary accommodation to stay with 66-year-old in-line skater Bonnie, based in Kensington and Chelsea. Meanwhile, Lucy moves in with Viv and Merv in Norfolk, as the 25-year-old tests out lodging as an alternative to living in a camper van

programme.title: Night Moves (2013)
programme.desc: A farmer, a high-school drop-out and an ex-soldier form a militant environmentalist group, and plot to blow up a controversial dam. While their plan is successful, it has many shocking consequences, and they are faced with a series of moral dilemmas in the aftermath. Thriller, starring Jesse Eisenberg, Dakota Fanning and Peter Sarsgaard

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Emma at Umoya Khulula Wildlife Center has a tiny bush baby that needs round-the-clock care. Jenna and Sean are forced to stop elephant research for the day as a bush fire comes perilously close to destroying their home. Meanwhile, on the Eastern Cape, vets Annie and Lisa undertake a vital rhino collaring procedure

programme.desc: Peggy's childhood friend Kay comes to town, and gets on particularly well with Molly - who soon realises that her new best buddy is not too keen on sharing. Comedy, guest starring Kathy Bates

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm is cajoled into pursuing an attractive new client who seems to be interested in him, but ends up realising how much he appreciates his wife. Comedy, starring George Wendt

programme.desc: In a bid to outdo Marie's culinary skills, Debra goes against tradition by serving a fish dish on Thanksgiving. Not to be upstaged, her meddling mother-in-law turns up with a turkey. Comedy, starring Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is ousted as captain of Nemo's basketball team, so Ray replaces him and begins devoting all his time to coaching - leading Debra to accuse him of neglecting the children

programme.desc: Ray learns the autographed baseball he has treasured since his father gave it to him as a child is a forgery, and is so shocked that he decides to tell daughter Ally the truth about Father Christmas

programme.desc: Niles and Martin take pity on Frasier and individually set him up on dates with three women who they believe will sweep him off his feet, but unfortunately things do not go to plan. Comedy, with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

With an over-confident chef and a partner propping up the bar, co-owner Madalyn faces a few difficult decisions

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In East Anglia, three rival couples compete to host the best dinner party and win £1,000. First up are ultra-competitive poker players Kim and Martin. Their teamwork is tested to the limit whilst preparing their menu of family favourites, with both cooks jostling to take charge. On night two, Debbie and Richard host an Orient Express-themed night of elegance fit for Agatha Christie herself, while finishing off the week are self-proclaimed gadget kings Jamie and Mark, who have a swishy piece of tech for just about every kitchen job going

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa seek legal help for a down-and-out man who claims to have devised the Itchy and Scratchy Show, only to have his idea stolen. The case is settled and justice done - but the outcome has an unforeseen effect on the programme's future. Featuring the guest voice of Kirk Douglas

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.desc: Vineyard owner Val Thomas comes up with a plan to attract tourists to the Isles of Scilly in the winter - an observatory that takes advantage of the area's clearn night skies. Cornishman Mark Rudge is converting unwanted apples into a decent profit, mussel farmers Barry and Matt Sessions hatch a plan to outwit the seagulls and geologist Kevin Page goes fossil hunting

programme.title: Council House Britain
programme.desc: Housing officer Charmain helps pensioner Mr Holland, a former shipbuilder whose flat is in a state of disrepair and is unable to do the work himself after taking a tumble. Meanwhile, ex-council tenant Max's estate is also undergoing major renovations. But having bought his flat through right-to-buy scheme and paid off his mortgage, the council now has to bill him an enormous £121,000 for his share of the essential, multi-million-pound works. In the pest department, Andy and Wayne tackle a derelict shop over-run with rats

programme.title: Lodgers for Codgers
programme.desc: Cameras follow another pair of young people as they take advantage of the millions of over-sixties sitting on empty rooms by moving in with them for a week. It seems Ché, who has been living in temporary accommodation his whole life, has landed on his feet when he moves in with multi-millionaire Charlie. Can the two find common ground? Meanwhile, 19-year-old Amelia swaps the family home for party-loving Karin's spare room

programme.title: Kevin McCloud's Rough Guide to the Future
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud sends three celebrities, comedians Jon Richardson and Phil Wang and broadcaster Alice Levine, around the world to take a light-hearted look at some of the planet's biggest issues and the technology that could offer solutions, from driverless cars to meat grown in laboratories. In the first episode, Phil travels to China to investigate ways to deal with waste, Jon explores the latest advancements in food production in America, and Alice encounters robots in Japan

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partner's parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice

programme.title: The Simpsons

Tristan prepares to return to university, but needs Siegfried's help to pay for his accommodation. However, his older brother is not prepared to part with a penny until he has proved he is serious about being a vet. James treats the Aldersons' prize bull, and Helen rewards his efforts with some unusual home baking

programme.title: Princess Margaret: Rebel Without a Crown
programme.desc: A profile of the Queen's younger sister, who was determined to live her life exactly as she wanted, even if that sometimes meant bringing the monarchy into disrepute. As a child she was as a mischievous and rebellious princess who loved being the centre of attention, while when she split up with photographer Anthony Armstrong-Jones she became the first major royal to get divorced so since Henry VIII

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a decorated petty officer, whose body was found in a sports arena. programme.title: Atlantic: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: As winter draws to a close, the Atlantic springs back to life and hope returns. Temperatures rise, days lengthen and food is plentiful again. However, spring in the north is short, the animals only have a few months to find food, a mate and start a family - all the while avoiding predators. Around the British and Irish coast, thousands of gannets that spent winter off southern Europe and north Africa, must find a place to nest before they can raise a family. Meanwhile, killer whales leave Iceland and head to the Shetland Isles, where they hunt harbour seal pups

programme.title: Walking Britain's Roman Roads
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the historic Roman road of Ermine Street, which connected the cities of London and York. Along the way, he examines religion in Roman Britain

programme.title: Brunel: The Man Who Built Britain
programme.desc: Examining the story of the Victorian engineer Isambard Kingdom Brunel, the man who designed the world's fastest railway, longest suspension bridge and largest ship. Over 150 years on from his death, this film goes back in time to explore the extraordinary stories behind Brunel's greatest creations, including the Great Western Railway and the Clifton Suspension Bridge. The film also explores the wider story of what kind of Britain Brunel's genius was able to flourish in

programme.title: Robin Hood (2010)
programme.desc: An archer fighting in Richard the Lionheart's crusading army returns home to England and assumes the identity of a nobleman killed in battle. His new-found status draws him into a dangerous conflict with members of the newly crowned King John's court, and a traitorous knight plots to aid the French in conquering England. Ridley Scott's medieval adventure, starring Russell Crowe, Cate Blanchett and Mark Strong

programme.title: Wild Britain
programme.desc: The large number of rivers that criss-cross the UK, providing a rich habitat for wildlife. Solid bones and high oxygen levels enable a young dipper bird to dive underwater for 30 seconds, and Atlantic salmon make the long journey back upriver to their spawning grounds. Meanwhile, otters and beavers are making a remarkable recovery after an absence of centuries

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: A student studying for her A-levels is struggling to sit at her desk due to pain in her collar bone, a new mother with hip problems comes in to discuss the cocktail of strong painkillers she is taking to manage her pain, and a man has an annoying growth on his head that bleeds whenever he combs his hair. Dr Wyne discusses the available care options with an elderly gentleman who has mixed dementia and his daughter

programme.title: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Return of the documentary following the work of medical staff at Stoke's Royal University Hospital, as they strive to save the lives of sick and injured patients. A one-punch attack in the street leaves a man with a potentially devastating head injury, and trauma team leader Richard quickly realises he needs to perform emergency surgery on a bleed inside his brain. A young man arrives with multiple broken bones and suspected internal injuries following a motorbike accident, while a factory worker hopes the team can save his arm after a horrific accident with a circular saw

programme.title: Extreme Nightmare Tenants
programme.desc: Case of landlords with nightmare tenants and the difficulties they had in evicting them, including Yossi Harel, who rented out his family home in north London to take a job in Israel. He thought he had the perfect tenants - a teacher and his family - but before long they stopped paying rent. Plus, a builder who came up against his tenant and her aggressive boyfriend and a lawyer tasked with evicting an anti-social tenant in Blackpool

programme.title: Noisy Neighbours: At War with the Noise Next Door
programme.desc: Following the work of Britain's Noise Enforcement Teams as they respond to complaints across the country and bring peace and quiet back to the nation. This time, enforcement officer John has to serve noise abatement notices on two loud residents, and a nuisance neighbour has his home raided and equipment seized

programme.title: Little Britons
programme.desc: Observational documentary following people living with dwarfism. Cameras follow Britain's shortest competitive bodybuilder Choon as he takes part in a tournament. Stand-up comedian Tanyalee prepares to support comic Jason Manford and the world's shortest bus driver Frank undergoes further driver training

programme.desc: Residents of a Welsh mining community at the start of the 20th century struggle to come to terms with the decline in their traditional way of life. Oscar-winning drama, starring Walter Pidgeon, Maureen O'Hara, Donald Crisp and Roddy McDowall

programme.title: Buchanan Rides Alone (1958)
programme.desc: A drifter rides into a town dominated by the members of a ruthless family. He befriends a Mexican in jail for killing a man who attacked his sister and tries to save him from the gallows, getting caught up in the evil clan's running internal conflicts in the process. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Craig Stevens, Manuel Rojas and Barry Kelley

programme.title: The Long Memory (1952)
programme.desc: A man is released from prison after serving a 12-year sentence for a crime he did not commit, and immediately sets about tracking down three witnesses who lied in court, bringing about his conviction. However, while seeking revenge, he discovers the case is more complicated than expected. Thriller, starring John Mills, Elizabeth Sellars, John McCallum and Geoffrey Keen

programme.title: Man in the Saddle (1951)
programme.desc: A wealthy and ambitious cattleman plans to seize all the land surrounding his own. A peaceful rancher living nearby ignores warnings to sell up and avoid a conflict, and as he suffers a campaign of intimidation, he is forced to adopt violent methods to defend his livelihood. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Alexander Knox, Joan Leslie and Ellen Drew

programme.title: Transcendence (2014)
programme.desc: A scientist working to develop artificial intelligence is assassinated, but his death provides the breakthrough he and his colleagues needed, as his own mind is uploaded into a computer system. Granted extraordinary knowledge, he begins planning to change the world for the better - with potentially horrific consequences for the human race. Sci-fi drama, starring Johnny Depp, Rebecca Hall and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets (2017)
programme.desc: When a dark force threatens a vast metropolis, special operatives Valerian and Laureline must race to identify the menace and protect the future of the universe. Luc Besson's epic sci-fi adventure, starring Dane DeHaan, Cara Delevingne and Clive Owen

programme.title: Along Came a Spider (2001)
programme.desc: A police forensic psychologist searches for the daughter of a senator, who has been kidnapped from her expensive private school by a media-obsessed teacher, sparking a desperate race to hunt down her psychotic and devilishly intelligent captor before it is too late. Thriller prequel to Kiss the Girls, starring Morgan Freeman, Monica Potter, Michael Wincott, Dylan Baker and Penelope Ann Miller

programme.title: Leaning into the Wind (2017)
programme.desc: Thomas Riedelsheimer's documentary following artist Andy Goldsworthy as he creates works that mediate, disrupt or commune with the environment

programme.title: Rage at Dawn (1955)
programme.desc: Three notorious outlaw brothers terrorise Indiana, using a small town as a safe haven and paying off local officials to turn a blind eye. A detective poses as a fellow bandit to set a trap for them, but the case is complicated when he falls for their sister, who remains misguidedly loyal to her villainous family. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Forrest Tucker, Mala Powers and J Carrol Naish

programme.title: Flame of the Barbary Coast (1945)
programme.desc: A cattle rancher falls for a San Francisco saloon-bar singer, but she proves to be in cahoots with a ruthless card sharp who wins all his money. Not to be outdone, he sets out to hone his card-playing skills for a rematch, unaware the city is poised on the brink of disaster. Romantic drama, starring John Wayne, Ann Dvorak and Joseph Schildkraut

programme.title: Track of the Cat (1954)
programme.desc: A troubled family starts to fall apart during a harsh winter in 19th-century northern California while staving off the menacing presence of a predator - until a tragic accident finally brings matters to a head. Western melodrama, starring Robert Mitchum, Teresa Wright and Diana Lynn

programme.title: Donovan's Reef (1963)
programme.desc: An American soldier settles down with a friend and a kindly doctor on a South Sea island to relax in the aftermath of the Second World War. The arrival of the medic's snobbish daughter throws their idyllic life into turmoil, leaving them struggling to make her father seem respectable. Comedy drama directed by John Ford, starring John Wayne, Lee Marvin, Jack Warden, Elizabeth Allen and Cesar Romero

programme.title: Max Steel (2016)
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old McGrath is bewildered and unsettled when he suddenly starts exuding increasingly powerful energy from his fingers. As this power grows to dangerous proportions, Max meets Steel, a small but feisty flying alien who says he can help. Family fantasy adventure, starring Ben Winchell, Maria Bello and Andy Garcia, with the voice of Josh Brener

programme.title: The Mountain Between Us (2017)
programme.desc: A London neurosurgeon desperate to attend an operation crosses paths with an American bride determined to get to her wedding. When their chartered flight crashes, they attempt to survive in the wilderness, while fighting their attraction to each other. Romantic adventure, starring Idris Elba, Kate Winslet and Beau Bridges

programme.title: Buried (2010)
programme.desc: An American truck driver working in Iraq is kidnapped by guerrillas, who seal him in a wooden box and bury it in the desert. Discovering his cell phone has been left in the box with him, he uses this fragile link to the outside world to try to get help - but his supply of air is running low and even he does not know where he is. Thriller, starring Ryan Reynolds

programme.title: Wild (2014)
programme.desc: A series of devastating personal traumas leaves a woman feeling self-destructive and lost. After spending years behaving recklessly, she decides to turn things around by embarking on an epic, solo trek along America's Pacific Crest Trail, which gives her the time and space to reassess her existence. Drama based on a true story, starring Reese Witherspoon and Laura Dern

programme.title: The Cassandra Crossing (1976)
programme.desc: A fleeing terrorist infects transcontinental rail passengers with a deadly virus - prompting the authorities to consider re-routing the train across a dangerously unstable bridge, hoping it will collapse and kill everyone on board to prevent the contagion spreading. Disaster epic, starring Burt Lancaster, Richard Harris, Martin Sheen and Sophia Loren

programme.title: Stalag 17 (1953)
programme.desc: The inmates of a German PoW camp are convinced there is a traitor in their midst when the guards seem to be forewarned of their escape attempts. An unassuming sergeant content to remain a captive until the end of the conflict becomes the focus of suspicion as mob mentality takes hold. Billy Wilder's Second World War drama, starring an Oscar-winning William Holden, with Don Taylor, Otto Preminger and Harvey Lembeck

programme.title: How to Murder Your Wife (1965)
programme.desc: A henpecked cartoonist publishes a comic strip depicting the murder of his new wife - who fears he is planning to bump her off for real. When she disappears without trace, he finds himself accused of murder. Comedy, starring Jack Lemmon, Virna Lisi, Terry-Thomas, Claire Trevor, Eddie Mayehoff and Sidney Blackmer

programme.title: A Beautiful Mind (2001)
programme.desc: Biopic of the brilliant American mathematician John Nash, whose prospects of a promising career with the CIA were confounded by paranoid delusions and schizophrenia as the stress of the job proved too much of a burden. Drama, starring Russell Crowe, Jennifer Connelly, Ed Harris, Judd Hirsch, Paul Bettany and Christopher Plummer

programme.title: The Girl on the Train (2016)
programme.desc: Having lost her job and her husband, alcoholic Rachel Watson spends time aimlessly travelling on a train. She gets drawn into a web of intrigue when she becomes fascinated by a woman's disappearance. Rachel thinks she has vital evidence in cracking the case, but gaps in her memory cloud her judgment, and before long her own life is endangered. Thriller based on Paula Hawkins' novel, starring Emily Blunt, Rebecca Ferguson, Haley Bennett, Justin Theroux and Luke Evans

programme.title: Funny Cow (2018)
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian fights for success on the brutally unforgiving working men's club scene of 1970s northern England. Drama, starring Maxine Peake, Stephen Graham, Paddy Considine and Tony Pitts, who also wrote the screenplay

programme.title: Daphne (2017)
programme.desc: A hedonistic London thirtysomething chef has her life thrown off balance when she witnesses a violent crime. British drama, starring Emily Beecham, Geraldine James and Tom Vaughan-Lawlor

programme.desc: Mary clashes with Sheldon's drama teacher over plans for a Halloween fundraiser for the church. Georgie falls for a rebellious teenage girl that Sheldon is tutoring

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Meanwhile, on the International Space Station, Howard is being bullied by the other astronauts. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon hires an attractive female assistant, but when she becomes interested in Leonard, Penny decides to mark her territory by sleeping with him. Meanwhile, Howard starts to lose his mind when his return from space is delayed another week. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi have a disagreement at the office and must prevent it from becoming a problem at home, whilethe kids try to extend Lowell's stay after realising he is an amazing cook

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam convinces Teddy to fight a kid who is bullying Emme, but Andi does not approve. Joe hires a nurse to help him recover from his knee surgery

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After Barry starts checking out the best medical schools, Lainey reveals she has won a scholarship to art college. Erica and Adam start to suspect that Murray loves the family dog Lucky more than them

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While investigating a serial killer, Peralta enlists Holt's help in an attempt to solve the case without the new captain finding out. programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Holt split the squad into two teams to help them win the Halloween heist contest. Each side attempts to steal the same item, a fancy-dress crown locked in a briefcase in the interrogation room in order to claim the title of 'amazing detective or genius'

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The youngster boycotts his favourite bread company when the taste of his favourite loaf changes, but matters soon get out of control. Meanwhile, Georgie tries to console Veronica after breaking up with her boyfriend

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The youngster becomes inspired by his hero Albert Einstein and tries to play the violin. Mary thinks that she may be pregnant and goes to buy a pregnancy test with Meemaw

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is not pleased when his assistant Alex starts flirting with Leonard and has a word with her about it. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys become stranded in the middle of nowhere when Leonard's car is stolen en route to the Bakersfield comic-book convention. Meanwhile, back at home, the women try to work out why the guys are so fascinated with such publications

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer

Troubled by the deaths, Anya looks back on her life as both human and vengeance demon and tries to work out which world she really belongs in. As far as Buffy is concerned, Anya has gone too far and must be killed before she does any more harm, but Xander remains determined to save his old girlfriend

programme.title: Angel

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's attempts to celebrate her birthday with an intimate night at home are interrupted by the news that Bernadette has gone into labour. However, it transpires that Howard, Raj and Stuart may have rushed the expectant mother to the hospital too early, with Raj having difficulty keeping the gender of the unborn child a secret

There's a linguistic battle of wits between Irish fashionista Laura and her date Frankie, with explosive results, and confident Charlie hopes to right his previous relationship wrongs as he meets one-time ballet dancer Nelly

programme.desc: Jake and Charles take Terry on a camping trip to help him deal with stress. Amy gets Gina to help her persuade the police department to buy a product she invented as a child. Holt helps Rosa to break up with Marcus. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Amy work together on a case, but wind up arguing over Jake's old, worn-out mattress. Meanwhile, Boyle scratches Holt's prized car, and the teenage boy Rosa sponsors as a 'big brother' is in trouble with the law. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole restores a petrol pump and turns a hubcap into a clock, and Simon O'Brien repurposes a copper immersion heater into a stylish wash basin

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Donna and Paul move into their new home in western France, but struggle with the language, while Adam from Warwickshire is hoping to join the band of expat chateau owners

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton heads to Herefordshire to meet couple Tim and Fliss, who have been fighting to get planning permission for their new home for three years while living in a static caravan, and hope to save £70,000 through a self-built, timber-framed house when they get the go-ahead to start work on a small plot of family land

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the Shelley Guest House in Aberystwyth, where its husband-and-wife owners hope to prove that their establishment offers the best value for money by providing their guests with an old-school form of entertainment, some Spanish cuisine and a monumental continental breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests travel to the five-star Ixworth House in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, where hosts John and Sharyn Snell are quietly confident their establishment will impress. John reveals his hidden talents at dinner, but his performance at breakfast the next morning does not go down well with all of the fellow B&B owners

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: In York, part-time panto dame Graham Smith runs the Georgian House & Mews, and takes his guests back in time with a Nordic test of strength. At supper, Hazel has romance on her mind, but the guests are left to fend for themselves at breakfast - until Graham makes a show-stopping appearance

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the George Hotel in Orton, Cumbria, for the fourth visit of the day. Owner Hazel McAleese organises a fishing trip as the afternoon activity, during which one of the guests decides to use the opportunity to give everyone a lesson in innuendo

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants featured throughout the contest reunite to revisit the highs and lows of their various stays, and as the B&B owners confront their critics face to face, they discover what the rival parties really thought of the quality of service they encountered. After the deliberations are over, the winning guest house is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Two of the young Asian elephants contract the herpes virus, leaving the keepers doing everything they can to save the animals' lives, using anti-viral medication and a pioneering blood transfusion. When silvery gibbon Tilu gives birth, dad Alven has to keep their older son, tearaway Eko, in check. The keepers wonder why jaguars Napo and Goshi have not mated after six years together, and a new species of cricket arrives at the insect house

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil Spencer and Kirstie Allsopp meet the Pogsons in Harrogate, North Yorkshire and offer advice to the family who are unsure whether to renovate their property or find a new home. After living in their three-bedroom house for 16 years, Carol thinks that it is time for a big change, but Andrew is adamant he is not moving house

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Donna and Paul start transforming their abandoned scullery into a kitchen. Meanwhile, Adam goes for a second viewing at a property on the slopes of the Pyrenees

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Stonemason Adam Purchase and his partner Nicola Brennan try to restore a dilapidated Grade II-listed silver-mine engine-house in Cornwall. With a budget of £100,000, Adam takes a year off work to transform the property into a new home, but has to rely on favours to complete the project before he runs out of time

programme.title: Lost Pyramids of the Aztecs
programme.desc: Archaeologists investigate the discovery of more than 100 ancient skeletons buried in a hillside outside Mexico City. They also attempt to decode the secrets of a mysterious ancient manuscript to reveal the secrets of Aztec ritual sacrifice, and finally manage to complete their groundbreaking experiment to build a replica Aztec pyramid

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Peter, 85, has been brought - unwillingly - to A&E by his stepson Brian. He cut his finger on some wire two weeks earlier and his hand is swollen and won't stop bleeding. Emma, 23, is rushed to St George's after crashing her car on the way to her father's house, while doctors also see to 86-year-old Harry, who fell down a flight of stairs a day earlier but didn't seek treatment. Ciaran, 27, injured his ankle the previous night while out with friends and was given a temporary cast. Emergency nurse practitioner Helen needs to get him X-rayed and replastered, but he faces a return visit for an operation

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A crew battles bad weather in Cumbria to reach injured 70-year-old hill-walker Jenny, while Scott's attempts at DIY land him in serious trouble, and biker Ronald needs urgent treatment after a crash

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz, with team captain Sean Lock and Johnny Vegas taking on guest captain Alan Carr and Lou Sanders. Lexicographer Susie Dent is joined by the Brett Domino Trio to adjudicate in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sam's Mediterranean Kabob Room in Monrovia, California, and within minutes of his arrival, is caught in the crossfire of an argument between the owner, his wife and their children, all of whom are feeling the pressure of working seven days a week. Can the chef save the business and mend the warring family's frayed relationships?

programme.title: Lost Pyramids of the Aztecs
programme.desc: Archaeologists investigate the discovery of more than 100 ancient skeletons buried in a hillside outside Mexico City. They also attempt to decode the secrets of a mysterious ancient manuscript to reveal the secrets of Aztec ritual sacrifice, and finally manage to complete their groundbreaking experiment to build a replica Aztec pyramid

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Father Jack is hauled off to the local old priests' home to be treated for a strange medical complaint. He is replaced by a younger man - who proceeds to drive everyone crazy by playing jungle music at ear-splitting volume for hours on end. Dermot Morgan and Frank Kelly star
